arts.ttl: Everton owners The Friedkin Group target £5bn move for Boston Celtics
arts.sum: The Friedkin Group are, reportedly, in the running to acquire the Boston Celtics NBA team.

arts.ttl: West Ham United sending officials to Rangers tonight for 26 goal summer target
